metadata.name: Technitium DNS Server
metadata.description: Authoritative and recursive DNS server with a web console, DNS blocking, and optional forwarders for self-hosted networks.

items.name: service_name
items.title: Service Name
items.description: Name of the service.

items.name: container_name
items.title: Container Name
items.description: Name to use for the container.

items.name: container_hostname
items.title: Container Hostname
items.description: Hostname used inside the container.

items.name: restart_policy
items.title: Restart Policy
items.description: Policy used for Restart.

items.name: dns_server_domain
items.title: Server Domain
items.description: Primary domain name used by this DNS server to identify itself.

items.name: dns_server_admin_password
items.title: Admin Password
items.description: Initial admin password for the DNS web console.

items.name: dns_server_recursion
items.title: Recursion
items.description: DNS recursion policy.

items.name: dns_server_forwarders
items.title: Forwarders
items.description: Comma-separated upstream DNS forwarders. Leave empty to use recursive resolution.

items.name: dns_server_forwarder_protocol
items.title: Forwarder Protocol
items.description: Protocol used for upstream DNS forwarders.

items.name: dns_server_enable_blocking
items.title: Enable Blocking
items.description: Enable Technitium block list functionality. Block lists can be managed in the web console.

items.name: dns_server_log_using_local_time
items.title: Use Local Time For Logs
items.description: Use local time instead of UTC for DNS server logs.

items.name: ports_web_http
items.title: Web Console Port
items.description: Host port exposed for the Technitium web console when Traefik is disabled.

items.name: ports_dns
items.title: DNS Port
items.description: Host port exposed for DNS.

items.name: traefik_enabled
items.title: Traefik
items.description: Enable Traefik integration for the web console.

items.name: traefik_host
items.title: Host
items.description: Hostname used for Traefik.

items.name: traefik_domain
items.title: Domain
items.description: Domain used for Traefik.

items.name: traefik_entrypoint
items.title: Entrypoint
items.description: Entrypoint name.

items.name: traefik_network
items.title: Network
items.description: Network used for Traefik.

items.name: traefik_tls_enabled
items.title: TLS
items.description: Enable Traefik TLS.

items.name: traefik_tls_entrypoint
items.title: TLS Entrypoint
items.description: Entrypoint name.

items.name: traefik_tls_certresolver
items.title: Cert Resolver
items.description: Traefik TLS cert resolver.

items.name: network_mode
items.title: Network Mode
items.description: Network mode. Use bridge for normal Docker networking, macvlan for a dedicated LAN IP, or host for DHCP-style deployments.

items.name: network_name
items.title: Network Name
items.description: Name to use for the network.

items.name: network_macvlan_ipv4_address
items.title: IPv4 Address
items.description: Static IPv4 address for the macvlan network.

items.name: network_macvlan_parent_interface
items.title: Parent Interface
items.description: Parent interface for the macvlan network.

items.name: network_macvlan_subnet
items.title: Subnet
items.description: Subnet for the macvlan network.

items.name: network_macvlan_gateway
items.title: Gateway
items.description: Gateway for the macvlan network.

items.name: network_external
items.title: External Network
items.description: Whether the network is external.

items.name: volume_mode
items.title: Volume Mode
items.description: Mode used for Volume.

items.name: volume_mount_path
items.title: Volume Mount Path
items.description: Mount path used for the volume.

items.name: volume_nfs_server
items.title: Volume Nfs Server
items.description: Hostname or IP address of the NFS server.

items.name: volume_nfs_path
items.title: Volume Nfs Path
items.description: Export path on the NFS server.

items.name: volume_nfs_options
items.title: Volume Nfs Options
items.description: Mount options for the NFS volume.
